ddls:
CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "app_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "app_name" TEXT /* Name of the application */,
  "app_type" TEXT /* Type of the application (e.g., web, mobile, desktop) */,
  "app_description" TEXT /* Description of the application */,
  "app_url" TEXT /* URL of the application */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the application was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the application was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., response time, latency, throughput) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric (e.g., ms, s, bytes) */,
  "warning_threshold" REAL /* Warning threshold for the metric */,
  "critical_threshold" REAL /* Critical threshold for the metric */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type (e.g., text, binary, JSON) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application the log belongs to */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Log level (e.g., debug, info, error) */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Log message */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log was created */,
  "thread_id" INTEGER /* ID of the thread that created the log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_thread_id FOREIGN KEY ("thread_id") REFERENCES threads ("thread_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application the feedback belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who provided the feedback */,
  "feedback_message" TEXT /* Feedback message */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating provided by the user (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., CPU usage, memory usage) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric (e.g., %, bytes) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_metrics_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "threads" (
  "thread_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each thread */,
  "thread_name" TEXT /* Name of the thread */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application the thread belongs to */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the thread was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the thread was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("thread_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_threads_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "timestamp" (
  "timeStamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log was created */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application the log belongs to */,
  "elapsed" INTEGER /* Elapsed time in milliseconds */,
  "label" TEXT /* Label for the log entry */,
  "responseCode" INTEGER /* Response code */,
  "responseMessage" TEXT /* Response message */,
  "threadName" TEXT /* Thread name */,
  "dataType" TEXT /* Data type */,
  "success" INTEGER /* Success flag */,
  "bytes" INTEGER /* Bytes */,
  "Latency" INTEGER /* Latency in milliseconds */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the timestamp was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the timestamp was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("timeStamp", "app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "timeStamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was created */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application the data belongs to */,
  "data" TEXT /* Actual data */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response entry */,
  "timeStamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the response was created */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application the response belongs to */,
  "response_code" INTEGER /* Response code */,
  "response_message" TEXT /* Response message */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the response was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the response was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "latencies" (
  "latency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each latency entry */,
  "timeStamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the latency was created */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application the latency belongs to */,
  "latency" INTEGER /* Latency in milliseconds */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the latency was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the latency was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("latency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_latencies_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application the dashboard belongs to */,
  "dashboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dashboard */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the dashboard was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the dashboard was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application the alert belongs to */,
  "alert_name" TEXT /* Name of the alert */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert the notification belongs to */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "recipient" TEXT /* Recipient of the notification */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id")
)
